heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of sprinkles or drizzle, mainly over high terrain. Highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s, except upper 40s to mid 50s southeast, and around 60 near the Massachusetts border. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of a rain shower from Route 9 southward; chance of wintry mix over the southern Greens. Lows mainly in the upper 20s to lower 30s; some mid 20s far north, and some mid 30s far south. North to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Periods of rain in the south, with a wintry mix possible in the southern Greens; scattered rain showers or a wintry mix in the mountains spreading north to around Route 2 in the afternoon. Valley highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s. East to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.
